Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel: Further Answers To Special Interrogatories; Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents; Compel Production Of Documens; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rolando Pasquali, Attorney at Law, Tel. 650.579.0100, for plaintiffs and moving party;
Julie B. Gustavson, of United Law Center, Tel. 916.367.0630, for defendants and moving party, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

ARGUED. PLAINTIFF LINDA TABOR-BECK Motion To Compel Further Answers To Special Interrogatories; Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents; Compel Production Of Documents is granted. Request For Sanctions is denied. Plaintiff's counsel shall revise and resubmit the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Jeff Wohl; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
